name: TitleMax Title Loans
description_short: Windcrest, TX location of TitleMax Title Loans at 4941 Walzem Rd Suite A offers quick title loans Monday–Saturday.
description_long:
Visit TitleMax Title Loans at 4941 Walzem Rd Suite A in Windcrest, TX to access quick title loan services. This standalone location in the Windcrest area is open Monday through Friday from 10 AM to 7 PM, with Saturday hours from 10 AM to 4 PM, and closed Sundays.

At this Windcrest, TX location, you can apply for title loans using your vehicle as collateral. The team here can guide you through the application process, answer questions about terms and requirements, and help you get fast funding. Call +1 210-526-6110 to speak with the Windcrest branch directly or to discuss your specific lending needs.

If you're a Windcrest resident needing quick cash, bring a valid government ID, proof of vehicle ownership (title), and your vehicle for inspection. TitleMax has been serving Texas customers for years, and this Windcrest location is ready to help with your immediate title loan needs.
address: 4941 Walzem Rd Suite A, Windcrest, TX 78218

pricing.guarantee_details: No money-back guarantee offered. Title loans are short-term secured loans; terms are set at origination.

pros: Funds available in as little as 30 minutes after approval
No credit score requirement — accessible to borrowers with poor or no credit history
No bank account required to obtain a loan
Borrower keeps and uses their vehicle throughout the entire loan term
Approximately 900 store locations across 13 states provide broad in-person access
Mobile app (iOS and Android) and online portal at account.titlemax.com for payments and account management
Founded in 1998 — over 25 years of continuous operation in the title lending industry
cons: APRs typically range from 100% to over 300%, making these among the most expensive consumer loan products available
Monthly fees can reach approximately 25% of the borrowed amount, compounding total repayment cost rapidly
Vehicle repossession is a real and documented risk if the borrower cannot repay on schedule
Regulatory history includes fines for misrepresenting loan terms, overcharging interest, and administrative fee violations
Only available in approximately 13 states — inaccessible to most of the U.S. population
Not BBB accredited; high volume of consumer complaints on BBB and ConsumerAffairs regarding repossession disputes and a data breach
best_for: Vehicle owners with poor or no credit history who need cash within hours
Unbanked or underbanked consumers who cannot access traditional financial institutions
Borrowers needing $601–$10,000 secured against a paid-off or nearly paid-off vehicle
Consumers facing a financial emergency after exhausting all lower-cost credit alternatives
diagnosis: TitleMax is best suited for vehicle owners with poor or no credit who face a genuine financial emergency and have no qualifying lower-cost alternative. The critical caveat is price: APRs of 100%–300%+ and monthly fees up to 25% of the loan amount make these loans extremely expensive, and defaulting puts the borrower at direct risk of permanently losing their vehicle.
services: Car title loans (collateral: vehicle title; borrower retains and uses vehicle)
Title pawns (Georgia locations only — legally distinct from loans)
Unsecured personal loans up to $2,500 (select states, including South Carolina)
Same-day funding in as little as 30 minutes
Online account portal (account.titlemax.com) — balance tracking, due dates, payment history
Mobile app (iOS and Android) for account management and payments
meta_description: TitleMax Title Loans at 4941 Walzem Rd, Windcrest, TX. Fast title loans available with same-day funding options.
